zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabelle Strathearn於大約1230年出生在法國時，她的父親Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn56歲，母親Matilda de Moravia53歲。她於1274年之前與Sir Patrick de Graham在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1296年9月3日在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabelle Strathearn于大约1230年出生在法国时，她的父亲Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn56岁，母亲Matilda de Moravia53岁。她于1274年之前与Sir Patrick de Graham在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1296年9月3日在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Annabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabella
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabelle Strathearn was born about 1230, in France, her father, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, was 56 and her mother, Matilda de Moravia, was 53. She married Sir Patrick de Graham before 1274, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 3 September 1296, in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, at the age of 67, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabelle Strathearn est née environ 1230, à France, son père, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Moravia, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Patrick de Graham avant 1274, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1296, à Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Annabelle Strathearn um 1230 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn 56 und ihre Mutter Matilda de Moravia 53. Sie hat vor 1274 in Scotland Sir Patrick de Graham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. September 1296 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabelle Strathearn è nata il circa 1230 nel Francia, sua padre, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Matilda de Moravia, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Sir Patrick de Graham prima del 1274, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 3 settembre 1296, nel Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabelle Strathearnが約1230年にフランスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearnは56歳，母Matilda de Moraviaは53歳であった。1274年以前にスコットランドでSir Patrick de Grahamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1296年9月3日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーで67歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Annabelle Strathearn(이)가 대략 1230년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda de Moravia(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1274년 이전 스컷랜드에서 Sir Patrick de Graham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1296년 9월 3일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabelle Strathearn nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em França, seu pai, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Moravia, tinha 53 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Patrick de Graham antes 1274, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1296, em Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabelle Strathearn родилась около 1230 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Moravia, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Patrick de Graham перед 1274 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 3 сентября 1296 г. в местности дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabelle Strathearn nació aproximadamente 1230, en Francia, su papá, Sir Robert Sinclair 4th Earl Of Strathearn, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Matilda de Moravia, tenía 53 años. Se casó con Sir Patrick de Graham antes de 1274, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1296, en Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
